content: TanStack Start deployment via Nitro. Vercel: detected automatically, runs in Node.js Functions, full npm ecosystem support, zero config. Cloudflare Workers: workerd V8 isolate, nodejs_compat flag required, some native modules not supported. Node.js: .output/server/index.mjs after build. Recommended deploy target: Vercel for simplicity (OSS project, free hobby tier); Cloudflare for edge performance. Both officially documented.
